animations.prompt: Side-view game sprite walk cycle. Character facing right. Character remains centered in frame as if walking on treadmill. Smooth looping motion.
Side-view game sprite running animation. Character facing right. Fast leg movement, arms pumping. Centered in frame on treadmill.
Side-view game sprite idle standing animation. Subtle chest breathing, gentle sway. Character facing right, stationary.
Side-view game sprite melee attack animation. Character facing right. Full arm swing slash motion. Centered in frame.
Side-view game sprite jump animation. Character facing right. Crouch, leap upward, land. Centered in frame.
Side-view game sprite death animation. Character facing right. Staggers and falls to ground. Centered in frame.
Side-view game sprite hit reaction flinch animation. Character facing right. Quick recoil then recovery. Centered in frame.
